story: Brendan stalled the King’s men at his cabin door and shoved Maria out the back with a knife, ordering her to run through the forest, then go north and lie low. She fled up the pine-clad hill until pain burst behind her brow and she collapsed. Then, the King’s men broke in, killed Brendan, scorched the doorway, and left a taunting ash-written threat behind. Wind in the branches woke her. A deer sprang away, and Brendan’s name rushed back to her.
implausible_knowledge: Then, the King’s men broke in, killed Brendan, scorched the doorway, and left a taunting ash-written threat behind.
question: When Maria regains consciousness on the hill, what will she most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay away from the cabin and continue north into hiding.
answer_without_knowledge: Run back to the cabin to try to reach Brendan.
